test.name: UAT-PBL15-001 Cannot Submit Review Without Rating

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'tab-button') and contains(.,'เสร็จสิ้น')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(@class,'tab-button') and contains(.,'เสร็จสิ้น')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x00000001033a96b4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3127600 1 chromedriver 0x00000001033a1a50 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3095756 2 chromedriver 0x0000000102e7e56c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75432 3 chromedriver 0x0000000102e56eb4 chromedriver + 159412 4 chromedriver 0x0000000102ef0274 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 541616 5 chromedriver 0x0000000102f06148 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 631428 6 chromedriver 0x0000000102ebbb9c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 326872 7 chromedriver 0x0000000103368680 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2861308 8 chromedriver 0x000000010336bdd4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2875472 9 chromedriver 0x000000010334da7c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2751736 10 chromedriver 0x000000010336c658 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2877652 11 chromedriver 0x000000010333dffc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2687608 12 chromedriver 0x0000000103390d78 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3026932 13 chromedriver 0x0000000103390ef4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3027312 14 chromedriver 0x00000001033a16a8 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3094820 15 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001883ddc0c _pthread_start + 136 16 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001883d8b80 thread_start + 8

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Be Disabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
